title: Tender Earthy Avocado Mousse with Fermented Ingredients
description: A quick-fix Brazilian dish featuring a tender and earthy avocado mousse served in meringue nests, infused with fermented flavors for a unique twist on keto-friendly desserts.
instructions: Blend avocado, coconut milk, coconut cream, cacao nibs, fermented coconut water, and agave nectar/honey until smooth.
Fold in vanilla extract gently to enhance the flavor without over-mixing.
Place meringue nests (if using) into a small baking dish or molds. Freeze until set, about 30 minutes.
Once nests are frozen, pour mixture evenly over them and freeze for an additional 2 hours.
